nasb.text: (just as it is removed from the ox of the sacrifice of peace offerings), and the priest is to offer them up in smoke on the altar of burnt offering.

esv.text: (just as these are taken from the ox of the sacrifice of the peace offerings); and the priest shall burn them on the altar of burnt offering.

cnv.text: 正如從平安祭的公牛取出來的一樣。祭司要把這些焚燒在燔祭壇上。

ccb.text: 正如取出平安祭牲的脂肪一样。他要将这一切放在燔祭坛上焚烧。
